title: Piper frustratum
intro:
There is no information available on the plant Piper frustratum. However, I can provide information on a similar plant, Piper nigrum, which is more commonly known as Black Pepper.

Piper nigrum is a flowering vine native to India and Southeast Asia, known for its long, narrow leaves and small, white flowers. The health benefits of Piper nigrum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Piper nigrum include piperine, a pungent alkaloid responsible for its characteristic flavor and aroma, as well as other compounds like ferulic acid and beta-carotene. The most common herbal preparations made with Piper nigrum include whole peppercorns, ground pepper, and peppercorn oil, often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of nausea and indigestion.
